creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Message to committer.

I (maintainer of www/webtrees) confirm that we have discussed this and that this port is now obsolete as it depends on php73.

Ports www/webtrees20 and the new www/webtrees21 are current versions.

So I agree that www/webtrees can be deleted.

If an entry for MOVED is desired/required, please commit www/webtrees21 and point at that. www/webtrees21 can be found in PR #267463.
